markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, tool migration, and operational updates.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Scrunch Migration:** GrowthX will investigate a direct data migration with Scrunch to preserve historical data. Diligent will also build an internal backup solution as a safeguard.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** The strategy will shift to address sales objections and leverage internal research, prioritizing proven SEO for lead generation over AI visibility tactics.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [**Website Migration:** The website freeze is delayed to the week of Feb 23 (likely Feb 25/26), requiring a content publishing pause.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [**New Content Source:** Diligent will share a library of app-exclusive educational content for repurposing, providing a new source for SEO-friendly assets and CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**January Performance Report:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [GrowthX delivered the January performance report, broken down by Business Unit (BU).](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [The report includes a summary and raw spreadsheet data for both SEO and AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [**Action:** kfarnham to review next week.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1785.0)
  - [**Comparison Content Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ahrefs data shows SEO still drives more leads than AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
      - [**Decision:** Continue comparison content tactically for specific BUs, but maintain focus on core SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [**Leveraging Internal Data:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [**Goal:** Showcase Diligent's thought leadership by using original research and SME commentary.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1601.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX to integrate new reports from the website's "Resources" section into content.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [**Addressing Sales Objections:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create content that directly addresses common sales objections and "how we win" scenarios.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
      - [**Action:** Update the content documentation with this new focus.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)

### Tool & Data Migration

  - [**Scrunch Migration:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
      - [**Goal:** Preserve historical data during the migration from Scrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
      - [**Action (GrowthX):** Investigate a direct data migration with the Scrunch team.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
      - [**Action (Diligent):** Build an internal backup solution as a safeguard.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [**Check That Platform:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
      - [GrowthX offered Diligent a 90-day free pro account for their new platform, Check That.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
      - [**Action (GrowthX):** Confirm if all Scrunch prompts have been ported to Check That.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [**Website Migration:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
      - [**Freeze:** Delayed to the week of Feb 23 (likely Feb 25 or 26).](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
      - [**Impact:** GrowthX will pause publishing and hold content until after the freeze.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [**Website Error:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [**Issue:** The production team cannot update a specific guide ("insanity") due to an error.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [**Action (Diligent):** Investigate with the web team, suspecting a link to the migration.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [**Track Terms:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [**Status:** Complete. kfarnham will update internal links to point to new product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [Begin DMI keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [Investigate Scrunch data migration with the Scrunch team.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
      - [Confirm if all Scrunch prompts are in Check That.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [Pause publishing and hold content during the website freeze.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [**Diligent:**](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [Update internal links to new product pages.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [Investigate the website guide error with the web team.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [Share the app-exclusive content library with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Review the January performance report.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [Provide an update on 2026 goals and targets next week.](https://fathom.video/share/qpBKzAs8HFm-iMvUWzrzkDY7jx7fYQ7V?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
